name: macbook-pro-chassis
title: MacBook Pro Chassis
description: Reusable MacBook Pro device-frame for AF surfaces — desktop-tier sibling to iphone-chassis. 16:10 lid + hinge + base strip. Variants: space-black (Apple Space Black #1D1D1F, correct for dark hero contexts), space-gray (Apple Space Gray #3A3A3C, neutral dark aluminum), silver (Apple Silver #D7D9DD, light/paper contexts). Context-aware lid shadow — paper-bg gets AFVQ ink-tinted shadow, dark-bg variants get neutral-black shadow per macbook-pro-m4-mockup.md §9. Sizes: compact (480px), default (560-640px), hero (720-880px), fluid (width-constrained at min(80vw, 1000px)). AF wallpaper fallback. Per Joe directive 2026-05-17: use Macs for desktop versions where useful, iPhone on mobile. preflight-device-mock skill MUST fire before real-surface use.
